title: Brainrot Kart
description:
ABOUT THIS GAME

Brainrot Kart is a multiplayer kart racing game where players compete in fast-paced, chaotic races. Choose from a variety of outrageous maps like "Gooning Gateway" and use unique items such as a Hawk Tuah ball to attack and sabotage other players. Show off your wild karts to your bros, including Quandale Dingle and Skibidi Toilet, each offering different kart stats.

BRAINROT KART FEATURES

Rizzy Brainrot Kart Action: Tear through chaotic maps and unleash wild items like the Hawk Tuah Ball

8-Player Multiplayer: Race and brainrot with your homies!

Goated Karts: Choose from cracked options like Quandale Dingle and Skibidi Toilet

Doesn't cost $80 like other kart games

RACE, RIZZ, GOON, REPEAT.

Play Now
